properties.name: app.security.actuator-public
properties.description: If true, expose /actuator/metrics and /actuator/prometheus without authentication.

properties.name: app.notifications.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable notification components such as Kafka outbox relay/consumer.

properties.name: app.outbox.relay.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between outbox relay polling cycles.

properties.name: app.kafka.topics.hr-notifications
properties.description: Kafka topic used for HR branch notifications.

properties.name: app.kafka.hr-consumer.retry-attempts
properties.description: Maximum retry attempts for HR consumer before sending to DLT.

properties.name: app.kafka.hr-consumer.retry-delay-ms
properties.description: Initial retry delay for HR consumer in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.kafka.hr-consumer.retry-multiplier
properties.description: Exponential backoff multiplier for HR consumer retries.

properties.name: app.kafka.hr-consumer.retry-max-delay-ms
properties.description: Maximum retry delay for HR consumer in milliseconds.

properties.name: security.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign and verify JWT tokens.
